name: 善良養母×惡毒生母
name_en: Kind Foster Mother × Evil Biological Mother
description: 形成「血緣不等於親情」的主題張力。養母斷指護女、生母綁架抽血，兩個母親的行為對比構成強烈的道德衝擊。

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: I only have one mother now. ... I only have one mother. That's Yolena Jones.
examples.context: 形成「血緣不等於親情」的主題張力。養母斷指護女、生母綁架抽血，兩個母親的行為對比構成強烈的道德衝擊。
